name: spedas-codex
description: Codex plugin for SPEDAS heliophysics workflows, backed by the spedas-agent-kit MCP server for CDAWeb, PDS PPI, and SPICE tools.

interface.shortDescription: Codex workflows for SPEDAS CDAWeb, PDS PPI, and SPICE work.
interface.longDescription: Use the spedas-agent-kit MCP server from Codex to discover heliophysics datasets, inspect parameters, fetch small file-backed time series, and compute SPICE ephemeris/coordinate products.
